user.title: Qinping Local Weather
user.description: Serve weather to QingPing CGS2 devices from a Home Assistant weather entity. Routes are exposed on HA's HTTP server; TLS must be terminated by an upstream reverse proxy listening on 443 with server_name qing.cleargrass.com.

data.station_name: Station name shown on the device

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Qinping Local Weather instance can be configured.
